name: Pinto Bean Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Combine all ingredients, except catsup, in a large bowl. Mix well.
3. Turn the mixture into a non-stick loaf pan, measuring 9-1/4 x 5-1/4 x 3 inches, and flatten.
4. Spread catsup or Barbecue sauce over the top.
5. Bake for 45 minutes. NOTE: Makes a good sandwich spread when cold.
